hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|shred|dd if=|mkfs|> ?/dev/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: destructive command — evidence integrity protected"}}'; fi

mkdir -p reports && jq -c '{timestamp: (now | todate), tool: .tool_name, input: (.tool_input.command // .tool_input.file_path // ""), success: (.tool_response.success // null)}' >> reports/audit_log.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true
